name: Feather

meta.title: Feather: Notion to blog in minutes (No-Code & SEO-friendly)
meta.description: Go from Notion to Blog - Write your content on Notion and automatically publish it to your SEO-friendly blog with a single click. No coding or design skills required.

headings.text: Turn Notion into a long-term organic growth engine.
Publish, manage, and scale SEO directly from Notion. Built to compound over time.
Why use Feather with Notion to generate organic traffic?
Everything you need to build a blog
Go from Notion to Blog in 4 Easy Steps
Start your blog while creating content in Notion.
Start your blog while creating content in Notion.
Add your site on the sub folder

featureBullets: Unlimited blog sites
Custom domain for each site
Analytics for each site
Pricing based on page views
Inbuilt analytics for all your sites
Find out where people are finding your blog
Find out which links people are clicking the most
Find out which of your posts are popular
Set all the proper meta tags and canonical links
Structured Schema markup for all your posts
Served from the edge to make the blog super fast
Easy controls to override the SEO settings
Your blog can be on a sub-domain like blog.example.com
Your blog can be the main domain like example.com
Your blog can also be a part of your existing website like example.com/blog
Weekly publishing
$0 ad spend
18k → 109k organic page views
25k+ organic sessions in the last year
Multiple #1 rankings on Google
All content managed in a single Notion database
Add your databases Use your own Notion databases or duplicate ours.
Map your fields Map your Notion fields with Feather fields.
Choose your domain Choose a domain or a subdomain for your blog.

textSample: Feather: Notion to blog in minutes (No-Code & SEO-friendly) Close panel Platform Tools Pricing Showcase Blog Help Docs Login Go back to main dashboard Tools Pricing Showcase Blog Help Docs Changelog Login Get started Turn Notion into a long-term organic growth engine. Publish, manage, and scale SEO directly from Notion. Built to compound over time. Start your free trial View examples Join 175+ creators, and new-age startups and start publishing your content today Trusted by 100+ startups Reflect Swipe Well Dash MY BotGhost A complete organic traffic machine Why use Feather with Notion to generate organic traffic? Feather is a simple yet powerful platform that helps create a superfast blog with Notion as a CMS. It's just set and forget! Create unlimited sites Create as many blog sites as you'd like. We don't charge you for creating additional sites. Unlimited blog sites Custom domain for each site Analytics for each site Pricing based on page views View detailed analytics See your page views, visitors, referrers, clicks, and much more for all of your blogs. Inbuilt analytics for all your sites Find out where people are finding your blog Find out which links people are clicking the most Find out which of your posts are popular Optimized for SEO All you have to do is to write good content that satisfies the needs of your readers. We take care of the rest. Set all the proper meta tags and canonical links Structured Schema markup for all your posts Served from the edge to make the blog super fast Easy controls to override the SEO settings Add your site on the sub folder You can optionally choose to have your blog on a subfolder. This is really good for SEO. Your blog can be on a sub-domain like blog.example.com Your blog can be the main domain like example.com Your blog can also be a part of your existing website like example.com/blog How Teams use Feather See how teams are publishing content and improving their traffic with Feather UX Playbook – UX education site Publis
